---
title: "CoordinateCleaner"
subtitle: Automated Cleaning of Occurrence Records from Biological Collections
maintainer: "Alexander Zizka"
date: "2023-07-01"
categories: [cleaning]
image: "logo.png"
---

https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.13152

https://github.com/ropensci/CoordinateCleaner/

https://cran.r-project.org/package=CoordinateCleaner
